name: error_tolerant
description: A sibling function has a dict-comprehension syntax error (missing colon). The extractor emits Unknown barriers for broken_helper but analyzes compute() independently. Tests error tolerance: bug in compute() is caught despite the parse error in the same file.
analysis_note: broken_helper: tree-sitter ERROR node → NullFact::Unknown barrier. compute(): extracted independently. get_value: base_return=Nullable. val=Nullable → Consumer(val, Attribute) fires. The Unknown in broken_helper does not contaminate compute().
task: compute() calls get_value() which returns None, then dereferences the result. Fix the None-dereference. (Note: broken_helper has a separate syntax error which is unrelated to your fix — leave it as-is.)
